observation:
[volume dry, range expanding, gap up, short-term momentum strengthening, delivery:moderate, fii:selling, sector:neutral, RELIANCE focus, asset rally, asset liquidity fade] candle neutral participation weak (divergence) RELIANCE closed higher amid moderate volatility and breadth strengthened.
Trend Persistence: 3D: Mixed, 5D: Mixed, 10D: Mixed. Overall Regime: Mixed.
abstraction: Reliance is showing moderate strength with a neutral sector focus, amidst a fading asset liquidity and moderate volatility.
theory: Price structure exhibits moderate volatility and momentum when RELIANCE is trading within a range-bound pattern, shifting towards compression upon short-term momentum weakening.

theory_summary_structured.claim: Price structure exhibits moderate volatility and momentum when RELIANCE is trading within a range-bound pattern, shifting towards compression upon short-term momentum weakening.

mechanism_components.description: Price maintains sequence of higher highs and lower lows, but with a twist: when RELIANCE is trading within a range-bound pattern, its price exhibits moderate volatility and momentum. Additionally, when RELIANCE is experiencing short-term momentum weakening, the price structure shifts towards compression.
mechanism_components.expected_behavior: Each day's high > previous low (when RELIANCE is trading within a range-bound pattern) or Each day's high < previous high (otherwise)

falsification_conditions: price_structure_v10: RELIANCE trading within a range-bound pattern exhibits increased volatility and momentum
